Source: Einstein GenAI Developer Guide
URL: https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/einstein/genai/guide
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Einstein GenAI Developer Guide

## Overview
Part of Agentforce platform. "The agent-driven layer of the Salesforce Platform" enabling deployment of AI agents working alongside employees to extend workforce capabilities and provide 24/7 customer service. Features a Trust Layer connecting data securely with large language models.

## Core Capabilities
- Conversational AI integrated with Salesforce
- Trust Layer for secure LLM data connectivity
- Customizable AI assistants

## Development Resources
- APIs & SDKs — Overview documentation for building solutions
- Agentforce Actions — Guide for building and enhancing actions
- Agent Script — Language for building agents in Agentforce Builder
- Agentforce DX — Pro-code tools for Salesforce CLI and VS Code integration
- Models & Prompts management via Prompt Builder features

## Additional Resources
- Salesforce Help articles on Agentforce and Generative AI
- Agentforce Agents documentation
